description: You find yourself in a foyer. The building is old and dark, but this room is oddly neat and tidy.
You descend into catacombs. The air is musty and bones lie scattered around you.
You enter a dungeon. Barred cells with chains and rusted tools line the hall.
You step into a chapel. Fresh candles line the walls around a blood-stained altar.
You enter a deserted ballroom, where valuables have been piled in careless heaps.
You enter the armory. Weapons and armor hang from every wall.
You enter an open courtyard. Dark wings beat overhead.
You enter the grounds. Howls echo from the darkness.
You enter a long hallway. Floorboards creak and broken portraits litter the floor.
You enter a mausoleum. You cannot shake the feeling of being watched.
You enter a throne room. Massive footprints surround shattered furniture.
You enter a cavern where whispers rise from a vast precipice.
You enter a treasure vault. Gold glints in the dark beneath fresh scorch marks.
